channel.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
Automotive

  • BMW Car Design - Interactive exploration of BMW design.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Blockchain/Crypto/NFT

  • RareRooms - 3D virtual rooms for NFT collections.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
IO Games

  • Bullet Bonanza - Fast paced, high fidelity, 3D Multiplayer FPS game from Kiloo.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Advertising

  • Fatal System Error - Interactive opera experience created by Dumbworld from the Royal Opera House.
  • DOOH Invaders - World's largest Space Invaders clone unveiled at Cannes Lions.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
AR/VR/XR

  • Orange Room - A highly realistic interior environment demonstrating room-scale VR.
  • Neon Bubblegum - Demo scene style WebXR-based homepage from Karsten Weil.
  • WebXR Lab - Sandbox for VR interaction experiments.

    • Virtual Events

  • Party Space - Virtual events platform.

    • Tutorials

  • PlayCanvas and Substance - Creating high-end artwork for vehicle configurators with PlayCanvas and Substance.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Browser Games

  • Stickman Climb - Physics based puzzle game.

    • Community

  • Openbase

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:
Browser Games

  • Nitro Knights - Futuristic jousting game.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2021
item.description:
Browser Games

  • Megopoly - Free to play casual strategy board game where you invest in virtual property.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021
item.description:
Advertising

  • Ally Racing - Retro NASCAR racing adver-game for Ally Bank.
  • Adidas ZX Game - Branded rhythm action game (German).
  • Call of Duty: Gunsmith - Promotional 3D experience themed on Call of Duty.

    • Automotive

  • Infiniti Experience - Explore the 2020 Infiniti range (Chinese).

    • PlayCanvas

  • Enginestars6.3k - Full source to the PlayCanvas run-time licensed under MIT.
  • glTF Viewer - glTF 2.0 compliant model viewer.
  • PCUI - Open source front-end framework used by the PlayCanvas toolset.

    • Product Configurators

  • Amisco Furniture - Interactive 3D furniture configurator.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Browser Games

  • Monopoly - The classic boardgame recreated in a 3D video game.

    • IO Games

  • Tank Royale - Cartoony fast-paced top-down multiplayer shooter.
  • Ink Wars - Real-time multiplayer game where you paint the neighborhood to win.
  • Mini Royale 2 - Battle Royale first person shooter.
  • Robostorm - Frenetic online multiplayer mech battle game.
  • TANX - Online multiplayer tank battle game.
  • Venge - 3D Multiplayer FPS shooter.

    • Product Configurators

  • 3D Plans - Virtual tours and interactive maps for the property market.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2020
item.description:
Automotive

  • Kia Virtual Experience - Explore Kia's latest line of cars.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2020
item.description:
Advertising

  • Cyber City - Promotional site for Visionaries777.

    • Tutorials

  • Rescue the Lunar Lander - Tutorial to make a simple physics based game.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2020
item.description:
Messenger Games

  • GameBytes - Multiplayer games for iMessage.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
Browser Games

  • Star Stable - Character registration portal for popular horse game.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Product Configurators

  • Sesotec Nexwey - Checkweigher machine visualizer.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Browser Games

  • Town Star - Online farming game built by the Creative Director of Farmville 2.

    • Automotive

  • Bennington Pontoon Boats - Boat configurator.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
Extensions and Utilities

  • playcanvas-vuestars19 - A PlayCanvas integration with Vue.js.

    • Browser Games

  • Geometry Run - Stylized endless runner built from geometric shapes.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Product Configurators

  • My Sliding Wardrobe - Closet configurator.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Automotive

  • Airstream Basecamp - Travel trailer visualizer.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020
item.description:
Messenger Games

  • Archery 3D - Archery simulator.
  • Golden Boot - Penalty kick game.
  • Hoop Master - Head to head basketball game.
  • Master Archer - Shoot the fruit from the top of Bob's head.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Video Tutorials - YouTube playlist for short PlayCanvas tutorials.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas May 4th - May 10th, 2020
item.description:
Community

  • Twitter
  • Discord Server
  • Facebook

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Oct 28th - Nov 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Tutorials

  • MDN tutorial - Build up a basic demo with PlayCanvas.
  • Game Design with PlayCanvas and JavaScript - PlayCanvas training series.
  • Create a Bowling Game - Create a physics-based bowling game.
  • Create a Space Shooter - Recreate Asteroids in this Tutsplus tutorial.
  • Official Tutorials - Large collection of official PlayCanvas tutorials.
  • Playing in Canvas - Pirron One's PlayCanvas themed blog.

    • Extensions and Utilities

  • playcanvas-arstars175 - Marker-based AR solution built on ARTollkit.
  • playcanvas-p2.jsstars17 - An integration with the p2.js 2D physics engine.
  • playcanvas-spinestars33 - Spine plugin for PlayCanvas for 2D animations.
  • Pirron One - Editor externsions implementing post effects, terrain creation and more.
  • Sublime Completionsstars3 - Sublime Text Autocompletion for the PlayCanvas API.
  • playcanvas-tweenstars32 - Officially supported tween animation plugin.

    • Technical Demos

  • After the Flood - Collaboration with Mozilla to promote WebGL 2.
  • Casino - Physically rendered 3D casino environment.
  • Global Illumination - GI approximation using interpolated lightmaps.
  • Seemore - Collaboration with ARM to promote mobile WebGL.
  • Sponza - Run-time lightmapped Sponza environment.
  • Star-Lord - First ever PBR demo from PlayCanvas.
  • Steampunk Slots - Physically rendered slots machine.

    • Messenger Games

  • Snap Games Support - Snapchat's gaming platform powered by PlayCanvas.
  • Let's Craft - Sandbox voxel-building game.

    • Advertising

  • eBay Report - Stats and facts from eBay Germany.
  • MMX Racing - Interactive 3D ad for a popular mobile game.

    • Browser Games

  • Flappy Bird - Guide the bird through as many pipes as possible.
  • Disney's Hour of Code - Moana - Learn programming fundamentals with Disney's Moana.
  • Beyond Bionic: Extreme Encounters - Outdoor adventures in this game from the BBC.
  • Galaxies: Combat - Carefully select power ups to defeat waves of hostile ships.
  • Lego Jurassic World: Off-road Race - Dinosaurs, LEGO and vehicle stunts.
  • Orbital Survival - Destroy wave after wave of enemies on a tiny world.
  • SWOOOP - Pick up gems in a bi-plane above a magical island.
  • Virtual Voodoo - Voodoo doll simulator.

    • PlayCanvas

  • Editor - Browser-based, real-time collaborative WebGL Editor.
  • NPM Package - Node.js packages of the PlayCanvas engine run-time.
  • Reference - API reference manual for the engine run-time.
  • User Manual - PlayCanvas user guide.

    • Automotive

  • BMW i8 - Car visualizer.
  • DAB Motors - Motorcycle configurator.
  • Indian Motorcycles - Motorcycle configurator.
  • Polaris RZR - Off-road vehicle configurator.

    • Product Configurators

  • Aritco Home Lifts - Elevator configurator.
  • Elfa Closets - Closet configurator.
  • iPhone 6 - iPhone visualizer.
  • Renewal by Andersen Windows - Window configurator.
  • Willab Gardens Greenhouses - Greenhouse configurator.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Community

  • HTML5GameDevs Forum

    • Extensions and Utilities

  • 8th Wall - Markerless AR runtime.
  • playcanvas-nodestars4 - REST API wrapper for Node.js.
  • tween.jsstars8k - Popular JavaScript tweening library that integrates easily with PlayCanvas.

    • Advertising

  • Ride Along 2 - Using WebGL to promote a Hollywood movie release.
  • Rugby World Cup - Promoting the Rugby World Cup in London's Piccadilly Circus.

item.title: playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas Sep 23rd - Sep 29th, 2019
item.description:
Community

  • Reddit
  • Forum
  • Stack Overflow
